description.overview: Also known as the French Mastiff, this ancient breed has a massive head and devoted nature. They're loyal companions who drool considerably.
description.history: The Dogue de Bordeaux originated in France.
description.temperament: Known for being loyal, devoted, vigilant.
description.grooming: Requires regular grooming appropriate for their short, fine, soft coat.
description.exercise: Exercise needs match their energy level.

verdict.summary: Also known as the French Mastiff, this ancient breed has a massive head and devoted nature. They're loyal companions who drool considerably.
